text:
The Trick Tower's 3rd Examiner is a Pro-Hunter and one of the examiners who oversaw the 287th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 2, Chapter 14 

Appearance

He is a large bald man, with a big nose and thick lips. He is seen wearing a light-colored suit.

Background

At one point in his life, he decided to take the Hunter Exam. He passed and eventually became an examiner for the exam itself.

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

The 3rd Examiner, along with Lippo and Togari, is at the beginning of the the Third Phase of the Hunter Exam. He and Lippo oversee the Hunter examinees, as they try and make their way through Trick Tower. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 2, Chapter 15 The Examiner assists Lippo with the lottery drawing after 24 of the Hunter examinees manage to clear the Trick Tower. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 22 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 23 

13 th  Hunter Chairman Election arc

After the death of Chairman Netero, he is seen at the Hunter Association taking part in the first round of the 13th Hunter Chairman Election. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 30, Chapter 320 

Abilities & Powers

The Trick Tower's 3rd Examiner has all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter.

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, he is capable of using Nen, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60 and given that he was an examiner of the 287th Hunter Exam, he's likely proficient in it.

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The character's name was never given in the manga or anime adaptations.

Anime and Manga Differences

In the 1999 anime adaptation the Trick Tower's 3rd Examiner has a full head of hair, Hunter × Hunter - Episode 13 (1999) while in 2011 anime adaptation he's bald. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 8 (2011) In the manga version he can briefly be seen with slight hair atop his head , then later appears to be bald.
